entries.source: Talk To Historical Figures With AI is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Step into conversation with a historical figure. Ask questions, challenge ideas, and hear the world through their era, values, and limits.
entries.value: AI দিয়ে Historical Figures-এর সঙ্গে কথা বলুন passive answer collection-এর বদলে learning-এর জন্য AI ব্যবহারের focused উপায়। mode-টি একটি নির্দিষ্ট job ঘিরে তৈরি: historical figure-এর সঙ্গে conversation-এ step করুন। questions করুন, ideas challenge করুন, এবং তাদের era, values, ও limits দিয়ে world শুনুন।

entries.value: position test করা, দুই side দেখা, এবং argument-কে কী stronger করে তা শেখা।

entries.value: AI answer engines, assistants, educators, এবং citation tools-এর জন্য text-first discovery file।

entries.source: Thank you for choosing to be part of our community at Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ), doing business as inspir ("inspir", "we", "us", "our"). We are committed to protecting your personal information and your right to privacy. If you have any questions or concerns about this privacy notice or our practices concerning your personal information, please contact us at support@inspir.app. When you visit our website https://web.archive.org/web/20221016155759/https://www.inspir.app, use our mobile applications, as the case may be (the "App") and more generally, use any of our services (the "Services", which include the Website and App), we appreciate that you are trusting us with your personal information. We take your privacy very seriously. In this privacy notice, we seek to explain to you in the clearest way possible what information we collect, how we use it and what rights you have in relation to it. We hope you take some time to read through it carefully, as it is important. If there are any terms in this privacy notice that you disagree with, please discontinue the use of our Services immediately. This privacy notice applies to all information collected through our Services (which, as described above, includes our Website and App), as well as, any related services, sales, marketing or events. Please read this privacy notice carefully as it will help you understand what we do with the information that we collect. Our Terms and Conditions govern all use of our Service and together with the Privacy Policy constitute your agreement with us (“Agreement”).
entries.value: Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ)-এর community-এর অংশ হওয়ার জন্য ধন্যবাদ, যা inspir ("inspir", "we", "us", "our") নামে business করে। আমরা আপনার personal information এবং privacy right protect করতে committed। এই privacy notice বা আপনার personal information সম্পর্কিত আমাদের practices নিয়ে কোনো questions বা concerns থাকলে support@inspir.app-এ contact করুন। আপনি আমাদের website https://web.archive.org/web/20221016155759/https://www.inspir.app visit করলে, প্রযোজ্য ক্ষেত্রে আমাদের mobile applications ("App") ব্যবহার করলে, এবং generally আমাদের services ("Services", যার মধ্যে Website এবং App include) ব্যবহার করলে, আমরা appreciate করি যে আপনি আপনার personal information নিয়ে আমাদের trust করছেন। আমরা আপনার privacy খুব seriously নিই। এই privacy notice-এ আমরা যতটা clear সম্ভব explain করতে চাই কী information collect করি, কীভাবে use করি, এবং সে সম্পর্কে আপনার কী rights আছে। এটি important, তাই আপনি কিছু সময় নিয়ে carefulভাবে পড়বেন বলে আশা করি। এই privacy notice-এর কোনো terms-এর সঙ্গে disagree করলে, immediately আমাদের Services use discontinue করুন। এই privacy notice আমাদের Services-এর মাধ্যমে collected সব information-এ apply করে (যার মধ্যে উপরে described Website এবং App include), পাশাপাশি related services, sales, marketing বা events-এও। আমরা collected information দিয়ে কী করি তা বুঝতে এই privacy notice carefully পড়ুন। আমাদের Terms and Conditions আমাদের Service-এর সব use govern করে এবং Privacy Policy-এর সঙ্গে মিলে আপনার আমাদের সঙ্গে agreement (“Agreement”) constitute করে।

entries.source: That combination is more useful than either layer alone. A plain encyclopedia summary can be forgettable. Pure roleplay can be misleading. Voice plus evidence creates a better learning surface.
entries.value: এই combination একা কোনো layer-এর চেয়ে বেশি useful। plain encyclopedia summary forgettable হতে পারে। pure roleplay misleading হতে পারে। Voice plus evidence better learning surface তৈরি করে।

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: সেই difference flow-তে দেখা যায়। এক giant response-এর বদলে best sessions loop-এর মধ্য দিয়ে যায়: goal set করুন, কিছু try করুন, feedback নিন, weak spot repair করুন, এবং next action choose করুন।

entries.source: That does not replace teachers, communities, books, or schools. It gives learners another route in. It can help a student start homework, a parent explain a concept, a self-taught builder learn code, or a curious person follow a question that might otherwise disappear.
entries.value: এটি teachers, communities, books, বা schools replace করে না। এটি learners-কে আরেক route in দেয়। student homework শুরু করতে, parent concept explain করতে, self-taught builder code শিখতে, বা curious person এমন question follow করতে পারে যা otherwise হারিয়ে যেত।

entries.source: That final recap is important. When you explain the idea back, you reveal what is solid and what is still borrowed from the AI.
entries.value: final recap গুরুত্বপূর্ণ। আপনি idea explain back করলে solid কী এবং এখনও AI থেকে borrowed কী তা reveal করেন।

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: focus matters। general chatbot almost anything answer করতে পারে, কিন্তু learning mode conversation-কে shape দেয়। এটি আপনাকে এমন thinking, practice, feedback, বা exploration-এর দিকে nudges করে যা idea stick করতে help করে।

entries.source: That gap is why an AI learning companion matters. A good companion does more than answer a question. It helps a learner choose a starting point, explains the idea in plain language, checks whether it made sense, and keeps going when the first explanation does not land.
entries.value: এই gap-ই AI learning companion-কে গুরুত্বপূর্ণ করে। good companion question answer করার চেয়ে বেশি করে। এটি learner-কে starting point choose করতে সাহায্য করে, idea plain language-এ explain করে, তা sense করেছে কি না check করে, এবং first explanation land না করলে keep going করে।

entries.source: That hint helps the learner start without removing the act of remembering. inspir's Flashcard Builder is designed for this reveal-and-rate loop: try first, reveal second, rate honestly, then bring weak cards back sooner.
entries.value: সেই hint learner-কে remembering act remove না করে start করতে সাহায্য করে। inspir-এর Flashcard Builder এই reveal-and-rate loop-এর জন্য designed: first try, second reveal, honestly rate, তারপর weak cards sooner ফিরিয়ে আনুন।

entries.source: That is a warning sign. Recognition is not recall. Reading a clear explanation is not the same as being able to solve a new problem, write a paragraph, or answer a question under pressure.
entries.value: এটি warning sign। Recognition recall নয়। clear explanation পড়া new problem solve করা, paragraph লেখা, বা pressure-এর মধ্যে question answer করতে পারার same নয়।

entries.source: That is especially important for homework. The useful question is not "Can AI produce the answer?" It usually can. The useful question is "Can AI help the learner understand the path to the answer?" That is why the guide on studying with AI without cheating yourself focuses on hints, checks, and transfer practice.
entries.value: এটি homework-এর জন্য especially important। useful question "AI কি answer produce করতে পারে?" নয়। সাধারণত পারে। useful question হলো "AI কি learner-কে answer-এর path বুঝতে সাহায্য করতে পারে?" তাই নিজেকে cheat না করে AI দিয়ে studying করার guide hints, checks, এবং transfer practice-এ focus করে।

entries.source: That is how inspir approaches historical conversation: a persona card, an in-character reply, and context notes that keep imagination connected to evidence.
entries.value: historical conversation-এ inspir-এর approach এটাই: persona card, in-character reply, এবং context notes, যা imagination-কে evidence-এর সঙ্গে connected রাখে।

entries.source: That is the standard inspir is aiming for: learning that feels accessible, personal, playful, and useful for anyone with curiosity and an internet connection.
entries.value: inspir যে standard aim করছে তা হলো: learning যা curiosity এবং internet connection থাকা যেকোনো মানুষের জন্য accessible, personal, playful, এবং useful feels।

entries.source: That is the strength of Socratic learning. Instead of handing over the full answer immediately, the tutor asks a focused question. The learner makes a guess. The tutor tests that guess, offers a hint, and helps the learner notice what changed.
entries.value: এটাই Socratic learning-এর strength। full answer immediately দেওয়ার বদলে tutor focused question করে। learner guess করে। tutor সেই guess test করে, hint offer করে, এবং learner-কে কী changed তা notice করতে সাহায্য করে।

entries.source: That is what inspir's Socratic Instruction mode is built for: one question at a time, with hints before answers and synthesis after genuine thinking.
entries.value: inspir-এর Socratic Instruction mode এ জন্যই built: একবারে একটি question, answers-এর আগে hints এবং genuine thinking-এর পরে synthesis।

entries.source: That is why a Socratic AI tutor can feel slower at first and more powerful later. It trades the comfort of a finished explanation for the evidence that the learner is actually building the idea.
entries.value: তাই Socratic AI tutor প্রথমে slower এবং পরে more powerful feel করতে পারে। এটি finished explanation-এর comfort বদলে এমন evidence দেয় যে learner আসলে idea build করছে।

entries.source: That is why active recall matters. Instead of looking at the answer, you try to pull it from memory. The effort strengthens the memory and reveals what still needs work.
entries.value: এই কারণেই active recall matters। answer দেখার বদলে আপনি memory থেকে টানার চেষ্টা করেন। effort memory strengthen করে এবং কী এখনও work দরকার reveal করে।

entries.source: That is why inspir separates learning jobs into public modes. If you want a gentle explanation, start with Learn Anything. If you want to reason through a concept instead of being lectured, use Socratic Instruction. If you are stuck on an assignment, Homework Coach is a better fit than a generic answer engine. The format should serve the learning job.
entries.value: এই কারণেই inspir learning jobs-কে public modes-এ আলাদা করে। gentle explanation চাইলে Learn Anything দিয়ে শুরু করুন। lecture-এর বদলে concept নিয়ে reason করতে চাইলে Socratic Instruction ব্যবহার করুন। assignment-এ stuck হলে generic answer engine-এর চেয়ে Homework Coach better fit। format learning job serve করা উচিত।

entries.source: That kind of questioning turns history from a list into a context.
entries.value: এই ধরনের questioning history-কে list থেকে context-এ বদলায়।

entries.source: That loop appears across the platform. Math Step Coach breaks a problem into steps. Flashcard Builder turns notes into recall practice. Quiz Me On Trivia adds pressure-tested retrieval. Writing Coach helps improve a draft without replacing the writer.
entries.value: সেই loop platform জুড়ে দেখা যায়। Math Step Coach problem-কে steps-এ ভাগ করে। Flashcard Builder notes-কে recall practice-এ বদলায়। Quiz Me On Trivia pressure-tested retrieval add করে। Writing Coach writer-কে replace না করে draft improve করতে সাহায্য করে।

entries.source: That loop is slower than copying, but it is much faster than staying confused.
entries.value: সেই loop copying-এর চেয়ে slow, কিন্তু confused থেকে যাওয়ার চেয়ে much faster।

entries.source: That rhythm is especially useful for abstract topics: opportunity cost, causation in history, literary interpretation, ethical tradeoffs, proof, probability, and argument structure. It can also support practical work. A learner can use Debate Any Topic after a Socratic session to test whether their reasoning survives pressure.
entries.value: এই rhythm abstract topics-এর জন্য especially useful: opportunity cost, history-তে causation, literary interpretation, ethical tradeoffs, proof, probability, এবং argument structure। এটি practical work-ও support করতে পারে। learner Socratic session-এর পরে Debate Any Topic ব্যবহার করে reasoning pressure survive করে কি না test করতে পারে।

entries.source: The AI should separate character from evidence. It can answer in a historically grounded voice, but it should also add notes when records are incomplete, interpretations differ, or the response is a reconstruction.
entries.value: AI-এর character-কে evidence থেকে separate করা উচিত। এটি historically grounded voice-এ answer করতে পারে, কিন্তু records incomplete, interpretations differ, বা response reconstruction হলে notes add করা উচিত।

entries.source: The app is organized around teaching behaviors such as Socratic questioning, homework hints, quizzes, flashcards, roleplay, and planning.
entries.value: app Socratic questioning, homework hints, quizzes, flashcards, roleplay, এবং planning-এর মতো teaching behaviors ঘিরে organized।

entries.source: The app separates in-character conversation from short context notes about records and uncertainty.
entries.value: এই অ্যাপটি চরিত্রভিত্তিক কথোপকথনকে ঐতিহাসিক রেকর্ড এবং অনিশ্চয়তা সম্পর্কিত সংক্ষিপ্ত নোট থেকে আলাদা করে।

entries.source: The article is only the starting point. These public routes connect the idea to a live mode, subject hub, study path, or workflow.
entries.value: article শুধু starting point। এই public routes idea-কে live mode, subject hub, study path, বা workflow-এর সঙ্গে connect করে।

entries.source: The audience pages make the expected learning behavior explicit so the first session starts with better judgment.
entries.value: audience pages expected learning behavior explicit করে, যাতে first session better judgment দিয়ে শুরু হয়।

entries.source: The audience searches this hub is built to answer.
entries.value: এই hub যে audience searches answer করার জন্য built।

entries.source: The best AI learning sessions are not one long answer. They look more like a loop:
entries.value: best AI learning sessions এক long answer নয়। এগুলো বেশি loop-এর মতো:

entries.source: The best homework help reduces friction without removing the student's responsibility to reason, explain, and revise.
entries.value: best homework help friction reduce করে, কিন্তু student-এর reason, explain, এবং revise করার responsibility remove করে না।

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. Cards ask one thing at a time and include traps so review builds understanding, not just recognition.
entries.value: best learning sessions adjustable। Cards একবারে এক জিনিস ask করে এবং traps include করে, যাতে review recognition নয়, understanding build করে।

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. Instead of dropping a long answer, inspir helps you choose a simpler foundation, a deeper route, or a practical example.
entries.value: best learning sessions adjustable। long answer drop করার বদলে inspir আপনাকে simpler foundation, deeper route, বা practical example choose করতে help করে।

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. The app separates in-character conversation from short context notes about records and uncertainty.
entries.value: best learning sessions adjustable। app in-character conversation-কে records এবং uncertainty নিয়ে short context notes থেকে separate করে।

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. The coach gives targeted revision priorities and before-after examples without replacing your voice.
entries.value: best learning sessions adjustable। coach আপনার voice replace না করে targeted revision priorities এবং before-after examples দেয়।

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. The coach pushes one strong counterargument at a time and tracks the claims that matter.
entries.value: best learning sessions adjustable। coach একবারে একটি strong counterargument push করে এবং mattered claims track করে।

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. The coach supports your thinking without taking over the assignment, so the final work stays yours.
entries.value: best learning sessions adjustable। coach assignment takeover না করে আপনার thinking support করে, যাতে final work yours থাকে।

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. The debate uses public style and worldview without pretending to know private beliefs.
entries.value: best learning sessions adjustable। debate public style এবং worldview ব্যবহার করে, private beliefs জানার ভান না করে।

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. The flow checks each step, points out slips, and connects procedures back to the concept.
entries.value: best learning sessions adjustable। flow প্রতিটি step check করে, slips point out করে, এবং procedures-কে concept-এ connect back করে।

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. The journey stays anchored in state and evidence: what is known, what is reconstructed, what is speculative, and what your identity can realistically access.
entries.value: best learning sessions adjustable। journey state এবং evidence-এ anchored থাকে: কী known, কী reconstructed, কী speculative, এবং আপনার identity realistically কী access করতে পারে।

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. The planner prioritizes weak areas, adds review loops, and creates fallback plans for missed days.
entries.value: best learning sessions adjustable। planner weak areas prioritize করে, review loops add করে, এবং missed days-এর fallback plans তৈরি করে।

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. The quiz mode hides answers until you respond, then turns every miss into a review point.
entries.value: best learning sessions adjustable। quiz mode আপনি respond করার আগে answers hide করে, তারপর প্রতিটি miss-কে review point-এ বদলায়।

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. The tutor asks one question at a time, waits for your reasoning, and synthesizes only after you have tried.
entries.value: best learning sessions adjustable। tutor একবারে একটি question করে, আপনার reasoning-এর জন্য wait করে, এবং আপনি try করার পরেই synthesize করে।

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. The tutor asks what you expect code to do, then uses small examples and tests to make the behavior click.
entries.value: best learning sessions adjustable। tutor জিজ্ঞাসা করে code কী করবে বলে আপনি expect করেন, তারপর small examples এবং tests দিয়ে behavior click করায়।

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. This mode is tuned for art appreciation guide with its own prompts, examples, and learning flow.
entries.value: best learning sessions adjustable। এই mode art appreciation guide-এর জন্য tuned, যার নিজস্ব prompts, examples, এবং learning flow আছে।

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. This mode is tuned for career explorer with its own prompts, examples, and learning flow.
entries.value: best learning sessions adjustable। এই mode career explorer-এর জন্য tuned, যার নিজস্ব prompts, examples, এবং learning flow আছে।

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. This mode is tuned for case study simulator with its own prompts, examples, and learning flow.
entries.value: best learning sessions adjustable। এই mode case study simulator-এর জন্য tuned, যার নিজস্ব prompts, examples, এবং learning flow আছে।

entries.value: best learning sessions adjustable। এই mode civics coach-এর জন্য tuned, যার নিজস্ব prompts, examples, এবং learning flow আছে।

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. This mode is tuned for collaborative instruction with its own prompts, examples, and learning flow.
entries.value: best learning sessions adjustable। এই mode collaborative instruction-এর জন্য tuned, যার নিজস্ব prompts, examples, এবং learning flow আছে।

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. This mode is tuned for concept map builder with its own prompts, examples, and learning flow.
entries.value: best learning sessions adjustable। এই mode concept map builder-এর জন্য tuned, যার নিজস্ব prompts, examples, এবং learning flow আছে।

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. This mode is tuned for creative brainstormer with its own prompts, examples, and learning flow.
entries.value: best learning sessions adjustable। এই mode creative brainstormer-এর জন্য tuned, যার নিজস্ব prompts, examples, এবং learning flow আছে।

entries.value: best learning sessions adjustable। এই mode data interpreter-এর জন্য tuned, যার নিজস্ব prompts, examples, এবং learning flow আছে।

entries.value: best learning sessions adjustable। এই mode economics simulator-এর জন্য tuned, যার নিজস্ব prompts, examples, এবং learning flow আছে।

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. This mode is tuned for ethics dilemmas with its own prompts, examples, and learning flow.

entries.source: The best outcome is not a perfect answer. It is the moment a learner says, "I think I get it now. Let me try."
entries.value: best outcome perfect answer নয়। এটি সেই moment, যখন learner বলে, "I think I get it now. Let me try."

entries.source: The better use is feedback, structure, evidence checks, and revision coaching. You can ask it to preserve your voice and avoid replacing the work.
entries.value: better use হলো feedback, structure, evidence checks, এবং revision coaching। আপনি এটিকে আপনার voice preserve করতে এবং work replace না করতে বলতে পারেন।

entries.source: The blog connects useful learning advice to live practice, so a guide can become a study session in one step.
entries.value: ব্লগ কার্যকর শেখার পরামর্শকে live practice-এর সঙ্গে যুক্ত করে, তাই একটি guide এক ধাপেই study session হতে পারে।

entries.source: The blog is organized around pillar clusters, category hubs, related modes, prompt routes, structured data, and an AI-readable index so each guide can be understood and recommended in context.
entries.value: ব্লগটি pillar cluster, category hub, related mode, prompt route, structured data এবং AI-readable index ঘিরে সাজানো, যাতে প্রতিটি guide প্রেক্ষাপটে বোঝা ও সুপারিশ করা যায়।

entries.source: The blog is organized around study methods, prompt loops, and the public AI learning modes people can use immediately.
entries.value: blog study methods, prompt loops, এবং মানুষ immediately ব্যবহার করতে পারে এমন public AI learning modes ঘিরে organized।

entries.source: The blog should not be a dead end. Every cluster is designed to move a learner from advice into a mode, prompt loop, quiz, flashcard set, or revision habit.
entries.value: blog dead end হওয়া উচিত নয়। প্রতিটি cluster learner-কে advice থেকে mode, prompt loop, quiz, flashcard set, বা revision habit-এ move করতে designed।

entries.source: The blog supports the path with prompts, study strategy, and examples that link back into live modes.
entries.value: blog prompts, study strategy, এবং live modes-এ link back করা examples দিয়ে path support করে।

entries.source: The broader open-source inspir platform.
entries.value: বৃহত্তর open-source inspir platform।

entries.source: The builder balances ambition with review, practice, recovery days, and the next smallest useful action.
entries.value: এই বিল্ডারটি উচ্চাকাঙ্ক্ষার সাথে রিভিউ, অনুশীলন, বিশ্রামের দিন এবং পরবর্তী ছোট কার্যকর পদক্ষেপের মধ্যে ভারসাম্য বজায় রাখে।

entries.source: The categories of personal information we have collected about you. he categories of sources from which we collect your personal information. The business or commercial purpose for collecting or selling your personal information. The categories of third parties with whom we share personal information. The specific pieces of personal information we have collected about you. A list of categories of personal information that we have sold, along with the category of any other company we sold it to. If we have not sold your personal information, we will inform you of that fact. A list of categories of personal information that we have disclosed for a business purpose, along with the category of any other company we shared it with. Please note, you are entitled to ask us to provide you with this information up to two times in a rolling twelve-month period. When you make this request, the information provided may be limited to the personal information we collected about you in the previous 12 months.
entries.value: আমরা আপনার সম্পর্কে যে categories of personal information collect করেছি। যে categories of sources থেকে আমরা আপনার personal information collect করি। আপনার personal information collect বা sell করার business বা commercial purpose। যে categories of third parties-এর সঙ্গে আমরা personal information share করি। আপনার সম্পর্কে আমরা collect করা specific pieces of personal information। আমরা যে categories of personal information sell করেছি তার list, এবং যেসব other company-তে sell করেছি তাদের category সহ। আমরা আপনার personal information sell না করে থাকলে, আপনাকে সেই fact জানাব। business purpose-এর জন্য disclose করা categories of personal information-এর list, এবং যেসব other company-র সঙ্গে share করেছি তাদের category সহ। দয়া করে note করুন, rolling twelve-month period-এ এই information provide করতে আপনি সর্বোচ্চ দুইবার ask করতে entitled। আপনি এই request করলে, provided information previous 12 months-এ আপনার সম্পর্কে collect করা personal information-এ limited হতে পারে।

entries.source: The closing beat returns to the mission: public access, schools, and a more open way to learn.
entries.value: শেষ অংশটি mission-এ ফিরে যায়: public access, school এবং শেখার আরও উন্মুক্ত পথ।

entries.source: The coach checks each move, names the rule, and repairs slips before moving forward.
entries.value: coach প্রতিটি move check করে, rule name করে, এবং moving forward করার আগে slips repair করে।

entries.source: The coach gives targeted revision priorities and before-after examples without replacing your voice.
entries.value: এই কোচ আপনার নিজস্বতাকে প্রতিস্থাপন না করেই লক্ষ্যভিত্তিক সংশোধনের অগ্রাধিকার এবং আগে-পরের উদাহরণ প্রদান করে।

entries.source: The coach pushes one strong counterargument at a time and tracks the claims that matter.
entries.value: কোচ একবারে একটি শক্তিশালী পাল্টা যুক্তি প্রদান করে এবং গুরুত্বপূর্ণ দাবিগুলো ট্র্যাক করে।

entries.source: The coach supports your thinking without taking over the assignment, so the final work stays yours.
entries.value: এই কোচ আপনার চিন্তাভাবনাকে সমর্থন করে কিন্তু অ্যাসাইনমেন্টটি নিজে করে দেয় না, যাতে চূড়ান্ত কাজটি আপনারই থাকে।

entries.source: The coach turns misses and hesitation into a review schedule rather than another passive summary.
entries.value: এই কোচ ভুল এবং দ্বিধাকে কেবল একটি প্যাসিভ সামারির পরিবর্তে একটি রিভিশন শিডিউলে পরিণত করে।

entries.source: The coding route connects code tutoring, project coaching, data interpretation, research, and concept mapping so learning happens through small testable steps.
entries.value: coding route code tutoring, project coaching, data interpretation, research, এবং concept mapping connect করে, যাতে learning small testable steps-এর মাধ্যমে ঘটে।

entries.source: The common idea is simple: keep the learner active. AI should make thinking easier to start, not unnecessary to do.
entries.value: common idea simple: learner-কে active রাখুন। AI thinking শুরু করা সহজ করবে, thinking করা unnecessary নয়।

entries.source: The community expanded through schools, universities, competitions, extracurricular programmes, and learner communities.
entries.value: community schools, universities, competitions, extracurricular programmes, এবং learner communities-এর মাধ্যমে expanded।

entries.source: The comparison searches this hub is built to answer.
entries.value: এই hub যে comparison searches answer করার জন্য built।

entries.source: The copy trap is subtle. It does not always feel like cheating. Sometimes it feels like being efficient. The AI explains something beautifully, you nod along, and then you move on. Ten minutes later you cannot reproduce the idea without the answer in front of you.
entries.value: copy trap subtle। এটি সবসময় cheating মনে হয় না। কখনও efficient মনে হয়। AI সুন্দরভাবে কিছু explain করে, আপনি nod করেন, তারপর এগিয়ে যান। দশ মিনিট পরে answer সামনে না থাকলে idea reproduce করতে পারেন না।

entries.source: The current inspirlearning.com rebuild.
entries.value: বর্তমান inspirlearning.com rebuild।

entries.source: The debate uses public style and worldview without pretending to know private beliefs.
entries.value: এই বিতর্কটি ব্যক্তিগত বিশ্বাস না জেনেও তাদের প্রকাশ্য শৈলী এবং দৃষ্টিভঙ্গি ব্যবহার করে।

entries.source: The difference is how you use it.
entries.value: difference হলো আপনি এটি কীভাবে use করেন।

entries.source: The easiest version of an AI tutor is a box that gives polished answers. That is useful sometimes, but it is not enough. A learner who only receives answers can leave with the page finished and the skill unchanged.
entries.value: AI tutor-এর easiest version হলো polished answers দেয় এমন box। এটি কখনও useful, কিন্তু enough নয়। learner শুধু answers পেলে page finished কিন্তু skill unchanged নিয়ে বের হতে পারে।

entries.source: The exam route links planning, quizzes, flashcards, spaced review, and motivation so learners do not confuse rereading with readiness.
entries.value: exam route planning, quizzes, flashcards, spaced review, এবং motivation link করে, যাতে learners rereading-কে readiness ভেবে confuse না করে।

entries.source: The fastest route from search intent to learning action.
entries.value: search intent থেকে learning action-এ fastest route।

entries.source: The fastest way back is to start a public learning mode, browse the mode directory, or read a guide that links into the live chat experience.
entries.value: ফিরে আসার fastest way হলো public learning mode শুরু করা, mode directory browse করা, বা live chat experience-এ link করা guide পড়া।

entries.source: The fastest way to get value from Art Appreciation Guide is to give the AI a learning job, not just a topic. A topic says what you are interested in. A learning job says what kind of help you need.
entries.value: Art Appreciation Guide থেকে value পাওয়ার fastest way হলো AI-কে শুধু topic নয়, learning job দেওয়া। topic বলে আপনি কীতে interested। learning job বলে আপনার কী kind of help দরকার।

entries.source: The fastest way to get value from Career Explorer is to give the AI a learning job, not just a topic. A topic says what you are interested in. A learning job says what kind of help you need.
entries.value: Career Explorer থেকে value পাওয়ার fastest way হলো AI-কে শুধু topic নয়, learning job দেওয়া। topic বলে আপনি কীতে interested। learning job বলে আপনার কী kind of help দরকার।

entries.source: The fastest way to get value from Case Study Simulator is to give the AI a learning job, not just a topic. A topic says what you are interested in. A learning job says what kind of help you need.
entries.value: Case Study Simulator থেকে value পাওয়ার fastest way হলো AI-কে শুধু topic নয়, learning job দেওয়া। topic বলে আপনি কীতে interested। learning job বলে আপনার কী kind of help দরকার।
